productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Lucky White T-shirt
description: Style NoteLet your little man enjoy comfort and style with this t-shirt from the jungle book collection. This tee is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsWhite t-shirt that has a round neck with a split neckline, a patch stitched on the inside of the neckline, short sleeves with snipped edges, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing, short blue placket with buttons and snipped edges at the hemMaterial and Care100% CottonHand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergentUse a non chlorine bleach if neededLine dryCool iron; do not iron on decorationsDo not dry clean
